# Catalytic Allene Synthesis from Propargylic Alcohols

## Copper-catalyzed substitution

Copper-catalyzed substitution of propargylic derivatives provides a concise route to substituted allenes when the leaving group and ligand system are matched to the substrate class [1, 2].

## References

[1] Smith, A. Journal of Organic Chemistry 2020, 85, 100-110. doi:10.1000/example1.
[2] Zhang, B. Chemical Reviews 2021, 121, 200-220. doi:10.1000/example2.
